---
id: Q-01
topic: Hosting for the review surface
stage: any
blocking: false
---
## Context

The P0 prototype is a standalone HTML file in the goal dir, opened from the
local filesystem. Works today, zero infra. Alternatives would add hosting cost
we may not need. Evidence: `cast/goals/cast-gtm/presentation_v2/preview.html`
is the P0 proof — one self-contained file, no server dependency.

## Recommended

- **Option A — Pure static file per goal:** `build.py` emits one self-contained
  HTML per build, opened via `file://`. Zero infra, zero auth surface, zero
  hosting cost. Reference: `cast/goals/cast-gtm/presentation_v2/preview.html`.

## Alternatives

- **Option B — Served from Diecast UI:** Adds a route + template integration.
  Justified only if we need multi-device review or deep-links from the Diecast
  dashboard. No evidence of that need today. See `docs/plan/2026-04-17-preso-editable-preview.md:228`.
- **Option C — Cloud-hosted per review session:** Overkill. Adds auth, expiry,
  collaboration surface. No demand signal observed. See
  `docs/plan/2026-04-17-preso-editable-preview.md:234`.

## References

- `docs/plan/2026-04-17-preso-editable-preview.md:228-235`
- `cast/goals/cast-gtm/presentation_v2/preview.html`
